SEARCH
Package Cataphract.API.Dragon

Class AccountCreate

java.lang.Object
Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate
public final class AccountCreate extends Object
A class to create new user accounts on the system. Can be restricted by policy "account_create"
Since:
0.0.1 (Zen Quantum 0.0.1)
Version:
3.9.7 (20-February-2024, Cataphract)
Author:
DAK404 (https://github.com/DAK404)
